title: Maximum Field Repetition
text: Maximum Field Repetition The maximum number of subfield repetitions allowed in the field. The default assumes one repetition, that is, a field that contains no subfields. Value Description True Sets the Max value of the REP( Min - Max ) field syntax code. False Equivalent to REP(1-1) The default assumes one repetition, that is, a field that contains no subfields. Applies To Field Syntax Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
